testsuite.name: findUrgentTasksDueWithinOneHour — 긴급 마감 태스크

testcase.name: 정상 케이스: 1시간 이내 마감 PENDING Task만 반환
엣지 케이스: 마감이 이미 지난 Task는 포함되지 않음 (BETWEEN 하한 기준)

testsuite.system-out:
12:50:19.901 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.teamsigma.taskmanager.repository.TaskRepositoryTest$UrgentTaskTest]: UrgentTaskTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 12:50:19.905 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.teamsigma.taskmanager.TaskManagerApplication for test class com.teamsigma.taskmanager.repository.TaskRepositoryTest$UrgentTaskTest . ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/

tasks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists user_activity_logs cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table tasks (delay_count integer not null, estimated_minutes integer not null, importance integer not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, deadline timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint not null, description varchar(1000), title varchar(255) not null, required_energy enum ('HIGH','LOW','MEDIUM') not null, status enum ('ARCHIVED','COMPLETED','PENDING','SNOOZED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table user_activity_logs (context_available_minutes integer not null, task_delay_count integer not null, task_estimated_minutes integer not null, task_importance integer not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, logged_at timestamp(6) not null, task_id bigint not null, user_id bigint not null, action_type enum ('ARCHIVED','ARCHIVE_REJECTED','COMPLETED','SNOOZED') not null, context_energy enum ('HIGH','LOW','MEDIUM') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, nickname varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create index idx_task_user_status_energy on tasks (user_id, status, required_energy) Hibernate: create index idx_task_user_deadline on tasks (user_id, deadline) Hibernate: create index idx_log_user_action_time on user_activity_logs (user_id, action_type, logged_at) Hibernate: create index idx_log_task on user_activity_logs (task_id) Hibernate: alter table if exists tasks add constraint FK6s1ob9k4ihi75xbxe2w0ylsdh foreign key (user_id) references users tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.deadline,t1_0.delay_count,t1_0.description,t1_0.estimated_minutes,t1_0.importance,t1_0.required_energy,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.status='PENDING' and t1_0.deadline is not null and t1_0.deadline between localtimestamp and dateadd(hour,1,localtimestamp) order by t1_0.deadline Hibernate: insert into users (email,nickname,id) values (?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (created_at,deadline,delay_count,description,estimated_minutes,importance,required_energy,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.deadline,t1_0.delay_count,t1_0.description,t1_0.estimated_minutes,t1_0.importance,t1_0.required_energy,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.status='PENDING' and t1_0.deadline is not null and t1_0.deadline between localtimestamp and dateadd(hour,1,localtimestamp) order by t1_0.deadline
